name: Reltio Cloud MDM & Data Management API
what_it_does: Reltio Cloud REST API for cloud-native Master Data Management (MDM) and Connected Data Platform. Enables AI agents to manage entity profiles and master data records (person, organization, product), handle entity resolution and duplicate detection, access relationship graph and hierarchy management, retrieve data quality scoring and validation results, manage data model configuration and attribute management, handle real-time data enrichment and match workflows, access tenant and application configuration, retrieve analytics and data quality dashboards, manage consent and privacy compliance workflows, and integrate master data with CRM, ERP, and CDI systems.
use_cases: Managing customer and entity master data from MDM automation agents
Accessing entity resolution and deduplication from data quality agents
Retrieving relationship graph and hierarchy data from enterprise data agents
Integrating master data with CRM and ERP from enterprise data governance agents
not_for: Simple CRM or customer database without enterprise MDM complexity
Product PIM without customer and organization master data needs
Small businesses without enterprise multi-source data consolidation
best_when: An enterprise using Reltio Cloud for customer, party, or enterprise MDM wants AI agents to automate entity resolution, data quality workflows, profile enrichment, consent management, and ERP/CRM integration.
avoid_when: DATA GOVERNANCE: MDM entity records are the golden source of truth — automated changes propagate to all downstream systems. Entity resolution must be reviewed by data stewards to prevent incorrect merges. Master data includes PII for customers and employees requiring GDPR/CCPA compliance. Consent management automation must be accurate — privacy violations create regulatory risk.

auth.notes: Reltio uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Tenant and application-level credentials with entity, attribute, and configuration scopes. Reltio Developer Portal with API documentation. Webhooks for entity change and match events. Cloud-native multi-tenant SaaS MDM with graph-based entity model.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise MDM subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-tenant enterprise subscription; pricing based on entities and data volume
pricing.notes: Redwood Shores, California. Founded 2011. Cloud-native MDM and Connected Data Platform. $200M+ in funding. 300+ enterprise customers including Pfizer, AbbVie, and Deutsche Bank. Graph-based entity model for complex relationship management. Real-time MDM for customer 360 and party data. Competes with Informatica MDM and Stibo STEP for enterprise MDM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth application; bulk operations throttled

known_agent_gotchas: DATA GOVERNANCE: Entity merge and unmerge automation is irreversible without recovery procedure — require stewardship review
Consent management automation must be accurate — GDPR/CCPA privacy violations from incorrect consent handling
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with Reltio Developer Portal
Entity resolution results must be human-reviewed for high-stakes matches (customers, patients, employees)
Multi-tenant isolation — verify tenant-level API credentials; do not share across environments
Real-time streaming for MDM changes requires webhook consumer infrastructure for high-throughput entity events
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer and entity master data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. PII master data and consent management sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: MDM and master data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Customer PII and healthcare data governance.
